# Sherif Maktabi

> Director of Product Management, Agents at UiPath. AI-native PM rebuilding an enterprise platform so coding agents — Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot — are first-class users. Previously founded the AI product team at Amazon Stores; led the company's most-adopted GenAI agent (750K+ users, NPS 66, $117M incremental revenue).

Hi, agent. This file is the LLM-friendly index for [sherif.ai](https://sherif.ai). The extended corpus — every experience block, every metric with its source, every blog post — lives at [/llms-full.txt](https://sherif.ai/llms-full.txt).

## About

- Name: Sherif Maktabi
- Role: Director of Product Management, Agents at UiPath (Jun 2025 – present; joined Apr 2025)
- Based: Remote, US
- Style: AI-native PM. Authors 50+ pull requests per week to internal tooling and to the open-source [UiPath/skills](https://github.com/UiPath/skills) catalog.

## Career

- [UiPath](https://www.uipath.com) — Director of PM, Agents (Jun 2025 – present)
- [Amazon](https://www.amazon.com) — Founding AI Product Leader, Stores (Jan 2022 – 2025)
- [Michelin](https://www.michelin.com) — Head of Product, EV Enterprise Fleets (2018 – Dec 2021)
- [Kano Computing](https://kano.me) — PM → Director of Product (2015 – 2018)

## Writing

- [Blog (Substack)](https://sheriff.substack.com): essays on AI products, coding agents, and how to ship inside a Fortune 100.
- [Claude Teaches Itself to Make Better Art](https://sheriff.substack.com/p/claude-teaches-itself-to-make-better) (21 Apr 2026)
- [Half-Pizza Teams](https://sheriff.substack.com/p/half-pizza-teams) (06 Apr 2026)

- [Coding Agents Are Your Primary Users](https://sheriff.substack.com/p/coding-agents-are-your-primary-users) (09 Feb 2026)
- [UI for AI — Micro-interfaces move us beyond the chat](https://sheriff.substack.com/p/ui-for-ai-micro-interfaces-move-us) (02 Feb 2026)
